claims.text: DeveloperWeek New York 2026 Hackathon runs online from May 25 to June 10, 2026.
Nimble asks teams to build an AI-powered agentic app that searches, browses, extracts, crawls, maps, or analyzes live web data.
Overall judging includes progress, concept, and feasibility.
A source-led evidence agent fits the sponsor challenge better than a generic research chatbot.
